summary: EXP-089 addresses HOL-COMPLETENESS and HOL-REDUNDANCY. Main finding: Part 2b sections already have thorough examples from prior integrations. Remaining gap: 2b.1 prose leads with hardcoded monitoring but none-monitoring is now the majority (41/70=58.6%). Replacement paragraph provided. Eclipse/Chapman consolidation strategy with 3 spoke patches also provided — canonical location is Section 4.2. Recommends creating separate EXPs for remaining redundancy clusters (aetheric refraction, Sydney-Perth, 95.2%, tidal WINs).
additional_recommendations: Create EXP for aetheric-refraction consolidation (Sections 1.5 vs 4.9 overlap)
Create EXP for Sydney-Perth consolidation (4 locations)
Create EXP for tidal WIN text consolidation (5 near-identical entries)
